abilities.name: Black Blood
abilities.description: All characters without Black Blood within 1 yard suffer 1 damage when this character suffers damage.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.description: Immune to falling damage. May ignore terrain and other characters when moving.

abilities.name: Terrifying (Living) (12)
abilities.description: Enemy Living must pass TN 12 Horror Duel when ending turn in engagement range or targeting.

actions: (1) Monstrous Talons (Pugilism) | AV: 7M (15M) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 4/5/6 damage. Mask/Tome Charge Through: Instead of damage, push target 4 yards. Mask/Crow Rip in Half: After killing, all enemies within p6 make TN 12 Horror Duel.
system.notes: Hulking creatures twice human height. Strong claws tear men apart. Keenly intelligent. Swift and strong. Even other Nephilim fear them. Never stop growing. Blood drinking fuels further growth.
